case_title: JACQUELINE NELSON VS. ALETA ASBURY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-02-2012.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM BENJAMIN SMITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-03-2012 THROUGH NOV-01-2012.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ASBURY, ALETA
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-16-2012. JUN-22-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF AUG-03-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT ASBURY, ALETA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-11-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-10-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-26-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-11-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BRIAN FREDRICK HAAVISTO.
